task: Route contextual Saju follow-ups through the expert semantic cache instead of direct NotebookLM

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied real entrypoint verification, scoped deployment, privacy, and independent model review requirements.
Applied origin-main deployment, Mac mini runtime verification, and completion-evidence gates.

root_cause.evidence: Equivalent full Saju request returned cache_hit=true in 1.957 seconds.
root_cause.followup_failure: OpenClaw selected the generic nlm-skill and executed nlm notebook query directly, bypassing openclaw_codex_bridge.py; the observed follow-up took about 118 seconds and produced no bridge audit entry.

implementation: Registered harness_saju_query as a dedicated OpenClaw tool.
Marked Saju turns by bounded OpenClaw run/session identifiers and blocked direct nlm or NotebookLM query tools only during those turns.
Recognized good-time and avoid-time requests as semantic requirements so reworded equivalents share cache.
Separated still-unclassified Saju intents by normalized-question hash to prevent incorrect cross-intent cache hits.
Generalized time-window intent using bounded polarity and time-term composition, including Korean negation, instead of one exact user phrase.
Accepted Korean, ISO, slash, and dotted solar dates so model-reconstructed tool arguments do not fail merely because their date notation differs.
Applied one shared semantic matcher to both request classification and answer validation, assigning each concrete time to its nearest positive or caution category.
Required stable machine-readable headings for requested time categories so variable NotebookLM prose does not cause valid expert answers to be discarded.
Deduplicated an explicit target date plus an equivalent today/tomorrow/yesterday marker before deterministic date parsing.

verification.name: focused regression bundle
verification.command: node tests/test_harness_bridge_plugin.mjs && .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_notebook_query_planning.py tests/test_openclaw_bridge.py tests/test_openclaw_response_quality.py tests/test_openclaw_agent.py
verification.result: Node plugin tests passed; final focused Python bundle passed 209 tests with one third-party deprecation warning

verification.name: stateful routing lifecycle
verification.result: before_prompt_build marked the Saju run, before_tool_call blocked an obfuscated direct nlm command, and agent_end cleared the marker

verification.name: independent multi-model review
verification.result: Claude clear and Copilot red_team_clear on the final shared request/answer semantic matcher; no blocker or major finding remained

verification.name: real production user-path diagnosis
verification.command: inspect OpenClaw session and bridge audit logs for the user's contextual good-time/avoid-time follow-up
verification.result: OpenClaw executed direct nlm notebook query; approximately 118 seconds elapsed; no bridge audit record was created, proving cache bypass rather than cache failure

verification.name: real production corrected cache path
verification.command: run the exact natal/target time-window intent once, then reword it with an explicit target plus today in a second private bridge call
verification.result: correct 유시생 first generation passed the expert contract in 64.595 seconds; equivalent reworded query returned cache_hit=true in 2.039 seconds; source_count 26 and source_revision 3f3c96c3da9a3b75d8e939dc58c6e41e0502bedca6d8d0563b15162fac23b6e9

verification.name: real OpenClaw contextual follow-up
verification.command: isolated OpenClaw session, then same-session contextual request for the best and avoid time windows
verification.result: harness_saju_query was exposed and used; detailed first answer was produced; contextual follow-up completed in 13.614 seconds without another NotebookLM query

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh core/notebook_query_planning.py scripts/openclaw_codex_bridge.py plugins/harness-bridge/index.js plugins/harness-bridge/openclaw.plugin.json plugins/harness-bridge/package.json plugins/harness-bridge/ROUTING.md plugins/harness-bridge/skills/harness-control/SKILL.md tests/test_notebook_query_planning.py tests/test_openclaw_bridge.py tests/test_harness_bridge_plugin.mjs docs/reviews/red_team/openclaw_saju_followup_cache_claude_20260724.md docs/reviews/red_team/openclaw_saju_followup_cache_copilot_20260724.md docs/reports/completion_evidence/openclaw_saju_followup_cache_20260724.json
deploy.result: All selected paths aligned with origin/main on Mac mini; native harness-bridge loaded as the sixth gateway plugin; conversation access and tools.alsoAllow enabled; stale managed-hook copy moved to recoverable scratch; harness_saju_query exposed; production focused tests passed; correct first generation took 64.595 seconds and semantic cache hit took 2.039 seconds; same-session follow-up took 13.614 seconds.
